title: chilita prolifera
intro: Chilita prolifera, also known as the Mexican clover or butterfly pea, is a perennial legume native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol, and acting as an antioxidant. Chilita prolifera can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a natural dye.
